title: aeschynanthus angustifolius
intro: Aeschynanthus angustifolius, also known as the Goldfish Plant or Dragon Teeth, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family. It is a tropical plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Aeschynanthus angustifolius can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
